_comment: English — source of truth. All keys must be defined here. Other locale files only need keys that differ from English.
ob.headline: Let's get your game ready
ob.subline: We'll collect the essentials once — then you focus on each platform.
dash.empty.title: No platforms activated yet
dash.empty.desc: Activate a platform below to start your submission checklist.
release.modal.title: New release
release.modal.subtitle: Group your next push to stores
track.submit.title: Submit to {platform}
delete.release.cant_body: This is the only release for this project. Create a new release first, then delete this one.
delete.release.submitted_body: "{label}" has been submitted to one or more stores. Deleting it removes all release records — this won't unpublish anything already live.
delete.release.active_body: Delete "{label}"? Any progress on this release will be lost.
lang.label: Language
ob.field.title.label: Game Title
ob.field.desc.label: Description
ob.field.desc.placeholder: Tell players what makes your game worth their time…
ob.dist.question: Where do you intend to make the game available?
ob.field.trailer_url.label: Or paste a YouTube URL
ob.field.privacy_url.label: Privacy Policy URL
ob.scenario.not_found: Couldn't find your game in stores — fill in the description below.
tip.distribution.regions: Gamer behavior varies significantly between regions. A successful launch carefully considers localization, culturalization, purchase behavior, and market fit in each region.
tip.distribution.languages: Native language support is a great way to increase traction and conversion in secondary markets.
tip.lang.reach: Subwoofer Tip: adding {lang} support could reach ~{total}M gamers in their native language across your selected countries.
tip.ios.prepopulated: Subwoofer pre-populated answers based on your game info and answers from other platforms.
tip.ios.kids_audience: Many developers select this by mistake — choose Yes only if children under 13 are your primary intended audience.
tip.store.found_on: We found this on {source}. Review the pre-populated description and correct anything that's inaccurate.
reg.tip.cn: Requires an ISBN game license from China's NPPA and a licensed local publishing partner. Foreign companies cannot self-publish.
reg.tip.kr: Mandatory age rating from Korea's Game Rating and Administration Committee (GRAC) before any distribution.
reg.tip.jp: CERO age rating required. Some content categories (extreme violence, adult themes) may be rejected or require edits.
reg.tip.de: USK age rating required. Certain content (hate symbols, excessive gore) is banned. USK-18 titles face advertising restrictions.
reg.tip.au: ACB classification required. Games refused classification cannot be sold. Content thresholds differ from US/EU standards.
reg.tip.br: CLASSIND age rating required for Brazilian app stores. Content descriptors must match local rating system.
reg.tip.sa: Content must be approved by the General Authority for Audiovisual Media. Religious and political content is strictly restricted.
reg.tip.id: Ministry of Communication and Information Technology registration required. Local content rules apply.
reg.tip.vn: Ministry of Information and Communications approval required before launch. Foreign games need a licensed local partner.
reg.tip.nl: Paid loot boxes face gambling-law scrutiny; some mechanics may require modification or legal review.
reg.tip.be: Paid loot boxes are classified as illegal gambling. Games with paid randomized rewards risk fines or a sales ban.
reg.tip.ru: Roskomnadzor content oversight applies. Geopolitical sanctions may complicate payment processing and distribution.
reg.tip.za: Film and Publication Board (FPB) classification required. Unclassified games may not be sold commercially.
q.violence.title: Violence or Combat
q.violence.label: Does your game contain violence or combat?
q.violence.desc: Includes fighting, weapons, blood, or characters being harmed.
iosint.profanity.label: Profanity or Crude Humor
iosint.profanity.tooltip: Offensive or vulgar language considered rude, obscene, or inappropriate. Includes swearing, slurs, insult-based humor, or jokes about bodily functions.
iosint.contests.label: Contests
iosint.contests.tooltip: Users compete for rankings or rewards. Includes skill-based competitions, trivia quizzes, or sport and fitness challenges.
iosyn.advertising.label: Advertising
iosyn.advertising.tooltip: Paid promotion of products or services within the app. Includes banner ads, video ads, rich media, or native ad formats.
ios.privacy.url.label: Privacy Policy URL
ios.privacy.url.tooltip: Apple requires a live, reachable URL. A missing or broken link is an automatic rejection reason.
ios.privacy.collects.label: Does your app collect any data from users?
ios.privacy.collects.tooltip: Includes analytics SDKs, crash reporters, accounts, device IDs, or any third-party SDK that collects data.
ios.privacy.desc.label: Describe your data collection
ios.privacy.desc.tooltip: Describe every data type your app collects and why. Subwoofer will translate this into the required Apple privacy label selections.
ios.privacy.desc.placeholder: e.g. We collect email addresses for account creation, device crash reports to fix bugs, and advertising IDs to serve relevant ads through our ad network.
ios.privacy.linked.label: Linked to Identity
ios.privacy.linked.tooltip: Data directly linked to the user's identity — such as their account, name, or email address.
ios.privacy.tracking.label: Used for Tracking
ios.privacy.tracking.tooltip: Data used to track the user across third-party apps or websites for advertising or analytics.
ios.age.category.label: Age Category
ios.age.category.tooltip: Override the calculated rating for apps targeting a specific age group or with EULA age requirements.
ios.age.suitability.label: Age Suitability URL
ios.age.suitability.tooltip: A URL with additional age suitability information for Apple reviewers.
ios.export.ern.label: ERN Number
ios.purpose.first_party_ads.label: Ads & Marketing
ios.purpose.first_party_ads.desc: Displaying first-party ads, sending marketing communications, or sharing data with entities who will display your ads
ios.purpose.third_party_ads.label: 3rd-Party Advertising
ios.purpose.third_party_ads.desc: Displaying third-party ads in your app, or sharing data with entities who display third-party ads
ios.purpose.analytics.label: Analytics
ios.purpose.analytics.desc: Evaluating user behavior, including to understand effectiveness of existing features, plan new features, or measure audience size
ios.purpose.personalization.label: Personalization
ios.purpose.personalization.desc: Customizing what the user sees, such as a list of recommended products, posts, or suggestions
ios.purpose.app_function.label: App Functionality
ios.purpose.app_function.desc: Such as to authenticate the user, enable features, prevent fraud, implement security measures, or perform customer support
ios.purpose.other_purpose.label: Other Purposes
cq.section.digital_purchases__cash_conve: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
cq_violence.text: Does the game contain inferences of, references to, or depictions of violence, blood, or gory images? This includes violence directed at the players' character. (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_violence_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_violence_types.opt.0: Violence or implied violence against humans
cq_violence_types.opt.1: Violence against anything other than humans (e.g., animals, fantasy creatures, robots, vehicles)
cq_violence_setting.text: In what kind of setting (context, storyline) does the violence occur?
cq_violence_pixelated.text: Does the game have a pixelated or childlike style?
cq_violence_pixelated.opt.0: Yes, it has a childlike style (e.g., likely to appeal to younger children)
cq_violence_pixelated.opt.1: Yes, it has a pixelated style
cq_violence_steam_types.opt.0: The display of weapons, bones/skeletons, or anguish
cq_violence_steam_types.opt.1: Accidental death, bodily injury, corpses, or violence description
cq_violence_steam_types.opt.3: Glamorization of or incitement to violence
cq_vh_reactions.text: How would you describe the reactions to violence?
cq_vh_presentation.text: How is this violence presented in the game?
cq_vh_presentation.opt.2: Rarely depicted from a distant perspective
cq_vh_presentation.opt.3: Often depicted from a distant perspective
cq_vh_presentation.opt.4: Rarely depicted from a close-up perspective
cq_vh_presentation.opt.5: Often depicted from a close-up perspective
cq_vh_gore_level.text: What is the level of blood and/or gore associated with this violence?
cq_vh_war.text: Does the game take place in a realistic or historical war setting?
cq_vh_innocents.text: Can innocent or defenseless characters be seriously injured or killed?
cq_vh_minorities.text: Does the game involve violence against minorities or vulnerable groups?
cq_vh_fierce.text: Are there any fierce sounds, sinister or intimidating characters, or dark overtones associated with this violence?
cq_vnh_reactions.text: How would you describe the reactions to violence?
cq_vnh_gore_level.text: What is the level of blood and/or gore associated with this violence?
cq_vnh_human_like.text: Do any of these creatures behave or respond like humans?
cq_vnh_real_animals.text: Is any of this violence against real-world animals?
cq_gore_assoc.text: Are these disturbing or gory images associated with a violent act that is shown?
cq_gore_explicitness.text: How explicitly depicted are these disturbing or gory images?
cq_blood_color.text: Is the color of the blood realistic?
cq_blood_violent.text: Is the blood related to violent acts?
cq_blood_amount.text: What best describes this type of blood in the game?
cq_fear.text: Does the game contain pictures or sounds likely to be scary, horrifying, or disturbing? (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_fear_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_fear_scary_freq.text: How frequent are the scary elements?
cq_fear_horror_freq.text: How frequent are the horrifying elements?
cq_fear_imminent.text: Is there an intense and unrelenting sense of imminent threat?
cq_language.text: Does the game contain any potentially offensive language? (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_language_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_language_types.opt.1: Moderate swearing or other language or gestures that could be considered moderately or significantly offensive
cq_language_types.opt.2: Discriminatory language (against race, religion, sex, etc.)
cq_lang_minor_freq.text: How frequently do minor profanities occur?
cq_lang_moderate_freq.text: How frequently does moderate swearing occur?
cq_lang_discrim_freq.text: How frequently does discriminatory language occur?
cq_lang_sexual_freq.text: How frequently do sexual expletives occur?
cq_crude.text: Please select all crude humor that the game includes:
cq_crude.opt.0: Adult humor: Comedic references to death, killing, crime, mental health, substance abuse, social and/or political issues including racial and personal beliefs
cq_crude.opt.2: Bodily functions (e.g., belching, flatulence, or vomiting) for humorous purposes
cq_crude_bodily.text: What bodily functions are used for humorous purposes in the game? Please check all that apply.
cq_crude_bodily.opt.1: Flatulence (with depiction of "flatulence cloud"), whimsical depictions of feces ("poo coils"), vomiting
cq_crude_bodily.opt.3: Act of human defecation visually depicted
cq_sexual.text: Does the game contain inferences of, references to, or depictions of sexuality, sexual violence, suggestiveness, dating games, revealing attire, or nudity? (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_sexual_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_sexual_types.opt.0: Sexual activity (including both moving and still images of sexual activity)
cq_sexual_types.opt.2: Dating games (interactive dating, marriage, or other romantic relationships between game characters)
cq_sexual_types.opt.4: Depictions of or references to sexual violence
cq_sex_act_freq.text: How often do sexual acts occur?
cq_sex_act_depiction.text: How would you describe the depiction of these scenes? Please check all that apply.
cq_sex_act_depiction.opt.0: Obscured/innuendo: Sex act is entirely off-camera or completely blocked from view
cq_sex_act_depiction.opt.1: Shown with no nudity: Characters are depicted in a sexual act but no nudity is shown
cq_sex_act_depiction.opt.2: Shown with partial nudity: Breasts, buttocks
cq_sex_act_minors.text: Do any of these sex acts feature characters that appear to be younger than 18?
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.text: How would you describe the suggestive/sexual themes contained in the game? Please check all that apply.
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.0: Suggestive references and innuendo in text, dialogue, or heard
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.1: Overtly sexual situations or visually depicted innuendo
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.2: References to sexual activity without descriptive detail
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.3: References to sexual activity with descriptive detail
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.4: Suggestion of minors involved in a sexual context
cq_sex_suggestive_desc.opt.5: Depictions of minors in sexually arousing poses, including where clothed
cq_sex_dating_focus.text: Are these games prominently featured or a strong focus of the product?
cq_sex_nudity_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_sex_violence_pres.text: How is the sexual violence in the game presented?
cq_substances.text: Does the game contain any reference to or use of drugs, alcohol, or tobacco? (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_sub_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_sub_drugs.text: How are illegal or recreational drugs present in the game?
cq_sub_fantasy.text: How are fantasy drugs present in the game?
cq_sub_medical.text: How are medical drugs present in the game?
cq_sub_alcohol.text: How is alcohol present in the game?
cq_sub_tobacco.text: How is tobacco present in the game?
cq_gambling.text: Does the game contain gambling, simulations of casino gambling/bingo, or gambling themes? (Does not refer to user-generated content.)
cq_gamb_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_gamb_types.opt.2: Playable casino games, lotteries, or racetrack betting
cq_gamb_types.opt.3: Any other games that use in-game currency/tokens to play and can reward the same currency through gameplay
cq_gamb_themes_focus.text: Are these gambling themes prominently featured or a strong focus of the product?
cq_gamb_steam_refs.text: Does the game include references to real-world gambling games or environments, not visible on screen?
cq_gamb_steam_env.text: Does the game include depiction of an environment that resembles a real-world, age-restricted betting or gambling service?
cq_gamb_bingo_cash.text: Can playing these bingo games reward cash payouts or rewards of significant monetary value?
cq_gamb_casino_cash.text: Can playing these casino games, lotteries, or racetrack betting games reward cash payouts or rewards of significant monetary value?
cq_digital.text: Does the game include the purchase or sale of digital goods, cash rewards, gift cards, play-to-earn features, convertible cryptocurrency rewards, or the issuance of transferable digital assets (e.g., NFTs)?
cq_digital_types.text: Please select all that the game includes:
cq_digital_types.opt.1: Cash convertible rewards (e.g., cash rewards, real-world items of monetary value, convertible cryptocurrency rewards, or other play-to-earn mechanics)
cq_digital_types.opt.2: Issuance (e.g., minting) of transferable digital assets (e.g., NFTs)
cq_digital_lootbox.text: Can these purchases include random items where the purchaser doesn't know what specific items or features they will receive (e.g., loot boxes), or any other chance-based purchases?
cq_mature.text: Please indicate if your game has content included in the major categories of mature content:
cq_mature.opt.0: General mature content: Content that deals with mature topics and may not be appropriate for all audiences
cq_mature.opt.1: Frequent violence or gore: Contains extremely violent or gory content
cq_mature.opt.2: Some nudity or sexual content: Contains occasional nudity or sexual content
cq_mature.opt.3: Frequent nudity or sexual content: Primarily about explicit or frequent nudity or sexual content
cq_mature.opt.4: Adult only sexual content: Contains sexual content that is explicit or graphic and intended for adults only
cq_mature_desc.text: What should customers know about any mature content in your game? (Visible on store page.)
cq_mature_desc.placeholder: Describe the mature content in your game — depictions of violence, sexual acts, or other topics players should know about…
cq_mature_access.text: How do we access the mature content in your game? (For review only, not visible to customers.)
cq_mature_access.placeholder: Is the content only on a certain map or scene? Does the player need to reach a certain level?
cq_ai.text: Does this game use generative artificial intelligence to generate content for the game, either pre-rendered or live-generated? This includes the game itself, the store page, and any Steam community assets or marketing materials.
cq_ai_desc.text: Please enter a message to players describing how this game uses generative artificial intelligence.
cq_ai_desc.placeholder: Describe how AI is used in your game…
cq_ai_live.text: Does this game use artificial intelligence to generate content or code during gameplay?
cq_ai_third_party.text: Does this game connect to an external, third party AI service during gameplay?
cq_ai_live_types.text: Please tell us about the types of live-generated content created by AI:
cq_ai_code_desc.text: Please tell us about the code generated in your game. What type of code? How are you using it? What guard rails are in place to prevent malicious or illegal use?
cq_ai_code_desc.placeholder: Describe the code generation and safeguards…
cq_location.text: Does the game share the user's current and precise physical location with other users?
cq_user_interact.text: Does the game natively allow users to interact or exchange content with other users through voice communication, text, or sharing images or audio?
cq_interact_types.text: Select all that the game includes:
cq_interact_types.opt.0: The ability to block users or user-generated content
cq_interact_types.opt.1: The ability to report users or user-generated content
cq_interact_types.opt.3: A system to filter in-game text chat (e.g., curse words, slurs, and sexual terms for the languages supported by the game)
cq_interact_types.opt.4: The ability to limit interactions to invited friends only
cq_extremism.text: Select all that the game contains:
cq_extremism.opt.0: Any swastikas, other Nazi symbols, or propaganda deemed unconstitutional in Germany
cq_extremism.opt.1: Any glorification, denial, or gross trivialization of the Holocaust or other events of genocide
cq_extremism.opt.2: Any content that can substantially erode the national identity of the Republic of Korea by describing anti-national acts or distorting historical facts
cq_extremism.opt.3: Disparaging or hateful messages directed at certain population groups
cq_extremism.opt.4: Advocacy for committing acts of terrorism
q.sexualContent.title: Sexual or Mature Content
q.sexualContent.label: Does your game contain sexual or mature content?
q.sexualContent.desc: Includes nudity, sexual themes, or suggestive material.
q.strongLanguage.title: Strong Language
q.strongLanguage.label: Does your game contain strong language?
q.strongLanguage.desc: Includes profanity, slurs, or offensive language in dialogue, text, or audio.
q.dataCollection.title: Data Collection
q.dataCollection.label: Does your game collect data from users?
q.dataCollection.desc: Includes accounts, analytics, gameplay data, device info, or third-party SDKs.
q.inAppPurchases.title: In-App Purchases
q.inAppPurchases.label: Does your game include in-app purchases?
q.inAppPurchases.desc: Includes upgrades, cosmetics, subscriptions, or virtual currency.
iosint.horrorFear.label: Horror/Fear Themes
iosint.horrorFear.tooltip: Content evoking anxiety, dread, or terror. Includes supernatural elements, body horror, or fear of isolation and death.
iosint.substancesAlcohol.label: Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use
iosint.substancesAlcohol.tooltip: Depictions of alcohol, tobacco, or drug use. Includes drunken behavior, smoking, or illegal drug consumption.
iosint.medicalTreatment.label: Medical or Treatment Information
iosint.medicalTreatment.tooltip: Diagnoses or guidance on medical conditions or health. Includes medication guidance, emergency care, or treatment information.
iosint.matureSuggestive.label: Mature or Suggestive Themes
iosint.matureSuggestive.tooltip: Implicit sexual references or mature topics for older audiences. Includes innuendo, suggestive imagery, implied nudity, trauma, or political strife.
iosint.sexualContent.label: Sexual Content or Nudity
iosint.sexualContent.tooltip: Non-explicit depictions of sexual behavior or partial nudity. Includes mild romantic intimacy, implied sexual activity, or sensual dialog.
iosint.graphicSexual.label: Graphic Sexual Content and Nudity
iosint.graphicSexual.tooltip: Explicit depictions of sexual activity or nudity. Includes full-frontal nudity or pornographic portrayals of sex.
iosint.cartoonViolence.label: Cartoon or Fantasy Violence
iosint.cartoonViolence.tooltip: Exaggerated or fantastical conflict easily distinguished from real life. Includes animated combat, magic used to cause harm, or cartoon violence.
iosint.realisticViolence.label: Realistic Violence
iosint.realisticViolence.tooltip: Physical conflict or harm involving humans in lifelike situations. Includes injuries from punches, shoot-outs, or combat between characters.
iosint.extendedViolence.label: Extended Graphic or Sadistic Violence
iosint.extendedViolence.tooltip: Prolonged realistic depictions of physical conflict. Includes extreme gore, human injury, or death.
iosint.gunsWeapons.label: Guns or Other Weapons
iosint.gunsWeapons.tooltip: References to or depictions of guns, weapons, or objects that may cause bodily harm. Includes guns, swords, or knives.
iosint.simulatedGambling.label: Simulated Gambling
iosint.simulatedGambling.tooltip: Wagering without real money. Includes simulated casino games, sports betting, or other wagering with no monetary value.
iosyn.parentalControls.label: Parental Controls
iosyn.parentalControls.tooltip: Tools allowing parents to monitor or restrict a child's in-app access. Includes content filtering, usage limits, or purchase restrictions.
iosyn.ageAssurance.label: Age Assurance
iosyn.ageAssurance.tooltip: Confirms a user's age meets requirements for specific content. Includes API checks, age estimation, or government ID verification.
iosyn.unrestrictedInternet.label: Unrestricted Web Access
iosyn.unrestrictedInternet.tooltip: Users can navigate to any webpage or freely browse the web. Includes embedded browser functionality or browser app.
iosyn.userGenContent.label: User-Generated Content
iosyn.userGenContent.tooltip: User-created content broadly distributed as part of the app experience. Includes videos, photos, text, or audio shared by users.
iosyn.messagingChat.label: Messaging and Chat
iosyn.messagingChat.tooltip: Direct user-to-user communication within the app. Includes text, voice, or video chat, group messaging, or public posting.
iosyn.healthWellness.label: Health or Wellness Topics
iosyn.healthWellness.tooltip: Self-care or lifestyle recommendations. Includes calorie tracking, dieting advice, or exercise recommendations.
iosyn.realMoneyGambling.label: Gambling
iosyn.realMoneyGambling.tooltip: Wagering using real money or currency exchangeable for real money. Includes casino games, sports betting, lotteries, and raffles.
iosyn.lootBoxes.label: Loot Boxes
iosyn.lootBoxes.tooltip: Randomized virtual item containers available for purchase. Includes randomized functional cards or cosmetic items.
